title: Grass Cutting
shortDesc: Precision lawn mowing for a pristine finish every time.
fullDesc: Our professional grass cutting service keeps your lawn looking its best throughout the growing season. We use top-of-the-range mowers suited to all lawn types and sizes. Our team ensures clean, even cuts with neat edges.

title: Hedge Cutting
shortDesc: Shaped and structured hedges that define your garden beautifully.
fullDesc: A well-maintained hedge frames your garden and adds real kerb appeal. Our hedge cutting service covers all hedge types. We cut to shape, remove all clippings and leave your hedges looking crisp and professional.
features: Before and after photos on request

title: Weeding
shortDesc: Thorough weed removal from beds, borders, driveways and patios.
fullDesc: Weeds compete with your plants for water and nutrients. Our weeding service targets all types of weeds across beds, borders, patios and driveways. We offer both manual removal and targeted treatments.

title: Design and Planting
shortDesc: Bespoke garden design and seasonal planting tailored to your space.
fullDesc: Transform your outdoor space with our bespoke garden design and planting service. Whether you want a vibrant cottage garden or a low-maintenance contemporary design, we will work with you to create a plan that suits your style and budget.
